title: F7N regression recheck after the vertical-momentum-advection sign fix + conservative const-K diffusion

skamarock_warm_bubble_500s.note: Identical to the pre-fix F7M/F7L warm bubble (the bubble is inviscid, nu=0, so the diffusion change is a no-op there; the vertical-momentum-advection fix does not change the smooth coherent bubble). No regression.

flat_rest_stability.note: Flat-rest exact machine-zero stability and rest-state-zero of the advection/diffusion are preserved: at rest u=v=w=0 so the vertical momentum flux (rom*flux3) is zero regardless of the correction sign, and the conservative diffusion flux mass*K*(d field/dx) is zero for a uniform field.
